send_to_cs: Send to CS immediately for post-purchase issues
Send to CS for payment processing issues
tone: Don't tell customers that we'll be restocking
Close the conversation when a customer responds 'no'
templates: If a cx reaches out regarding the Early Access event, use EAE shortcut
For cx reaching out in Spanish use SSC shortcut
For checkout issues use the "Check out Issues" temp
For store item availability, use SPA shortcut
If cx's email doesn't work for early access, use EEA shortcut
dos_and_donts: They occasionally run sign-up campaigns where cx text certain keywords (“releases,” “early access”) to join a list. If a customer sends a similar keyword:
➜ Check the website banner or landing page to confirm if it's a current keyword trigger
➜ If confirmed, close the convo, if not you can respond
All clothing is true to size unless otherwise stated on the product page
You can use these sizing charts for reference (for internal use only): https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1kmra_vOwCJuHoAx9D4L4Qx95rxafHcrqn-ZGutfzLgg/edit?usp=sharing
🅿️ If customers say they want to purchase in store - encourage them to buy online & pick up in-store
For store info q's (phone number/additional info) - use the store locator with your VPN turned on!
drive_to_purchase: 🅿️ If customers are looking for an outfit recommendation/item pairing - direct them to the "shop the look" section on each product page or use the LK shortcut

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

conversation.message_text: Steve Madden: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel. Privacy: attnl.tv/p/EyJ

Steve Madden: Welcome to Steve Madden! Enjoy an exclusive 20% OFF your first order when you click here: http://stevemadden.io/sl/e0xYm0tp .

Happy shopping!

Steve Madden: Oh, also, a lot of people like getting personal recs from us. Over the next few days we’ll try to help you find something that you will love.

Need help finding your sole-mate? Check out what's new this month to find the perfect style for this season > http://stevemadden.io/sl/_AM9--ba .

Dear steve madden,

I am writing to express my admiration for your products and the values your brand represents. Your commitment to quality and innovation truly resonates with me. I have been a loyal supporter of your brand for some time now, and I genuinely love using your products.

I am passionate about sharing great finds with others, and I believe that your products deserve more recognition. As someone who enjoys promoting exceptional items, I would be thrilled to showcase your products to my audience. I am confident that my followers would appreciate and benefit from learning more about your offerings.

I am excited about the possibility of collaborating with your brand to create engaging content that highlights the unique features of your products. I am dedicated to providing authentic and positive reviews that will resonate with my audience.

Thank you for considering this partnership opportunity. I am looking forward to the possibility of working together to promote your outstanding products.

Warm regards,

Cecia

Steve Madden: Hello Cecia,

Thank you for your kind words and interest in Steve Madden. We're thrilled to hear about your passion for our brand and products. For collaboration inquiries, please reach out to our marketing team directly at marketing@stevemadden.com. They'll be able to provide you with more information about potential partnership opportunities.

Best,
Allie
